name: mjrender
description: Deterministic game-state oracle over Tenhou mjlog files: commentary transcript, board snapshots, structured fact queries, and incremental commentary weaving.
long_description: Stateful session over a Tenhou mahjong log: mj_open_log parses the log once (absolute path to a .mjlog/.xml file, or a tenhou.net replay/log URL) and every other tool operates on it. Renders an LLM-ready Japanese commentary transcript with computed metrics (shanten/ukeire/waits/dora/danger evidence) and 〔解説ポイント#N〕 anchors, and answers queries against the same replay engine: mj_render_game (crude game outline), mj_render_kyoku (one round in full detail), mj_list_anchors, mj_get_snapshot, plus structured fact tools (kyoku start/result, riichi declarations, final standings). Commentary is saved server-side one anchor at a time (mj_add_comment, mj_add_note for ★ lines, mj_draft_status for progress); mj_weave_commentary splices the accumulated draft into a re-rendered transcript and writes the finished document to a file, so the model never copies fact lines.

tools.name: mj_open_log
tools.description: Parse a mjlog (path or tenhou.net URL) into the session; all other tools use it

tools.name: mj_render_game
tools.description: Crude game outline: per-kyoku headers, results, and anchor index

tools.name: mj_render_kyoku
tools.description: One round in full per-turn detail, with game-global anchor ids

tools.name: mj_list_anchors
tools.description: All commentary anchors (#id, kind, kyoku, junme, seat, topic)

tools.name: mj_get_snapshot
tools.description: Full board state at an anchor or kyoku+junme

tools.name: mj_add_comment
tools.description: Save commentary for one or more anchors into the session draft

tools.name: mj_add_note
tools.description: Save a one-liner for a ★ line (kyoku+junme+seat) into the draft

tools.name: mj_draft_status
tools.description: Draft checklist: filled/unfilled anchors and saved ★ notes

tools.name: mj_weave_commentary
tools.description: Weave the accumulated draft into the transcript, written to a file
